MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. REAL PARTies IN INTEREST STEVEN DODARO, SARA SHEPHERD'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Off calendar per the dismissal of Mr. Dodaro and Ms. Shepherd filed on April 11, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Mtn For Injunction
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Hall (415-512-9865) of MC Hall & Associates for John Banner and Doug Welsh, plaintiffs and moving parties / Paul F. Utrecht (415-357-0600) of U & L, defendant and opposing party in Pro Per

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: PLAINTIFFS JOHN BANNER and DOUG WELSH'S Motion for Injunction is taken under submission. Plaintiff submits a proposed order and proposed preliminary injunction. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, CSR: Tamra Willat-Harrison #4609 (415-272-1753) (D501)
